title: School children; violation of law
doc_html:
§736.  School children; violation of law

Whoever violates R.S. 45:734 through 45:735 shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars or imprisoned for not more than two months.
doc_text:
§736.  School children; violation of law
Whoever violates R.S. 45:734 through 45:735 shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars or imprisoned for not more than two months.
